plugins.name: daruma-claude
plugins.description: Claude Code + oh-my-claudecode integration for tupical/daruma. Drives the parse/decompose/plan/execute pipeline, ships /daruma-claude:{tasks,plan,next,mine,start,sync,capture,status,close,doctor,setup} slash commands, SessionStart/Stop hooks, and a managed CLAUDE.md policy that makes daruma the default tracker for tasks and plans.
